changes.newValue: Implemented in internal/storage/agent_registry_store.go (AgentRegistryStore with SQLite) + internal/mcp/agent_registry.go. Agent registry tracks active sessions with heartbeat/TTL, task locking with conflict detection, auto-release on disconnect. Store.Agents field added to Store struct. Lock denied returns owner info.
